rationale: The citing paper’s notes explicitly frame prior literature as having “largely documented guilt” in hedonic-versus-functional trade-offs, and the cited paper’s central contribution is a guilt-justification mechanism for indulgent (luxury/hedonic) choice. Given this direct construct overlap (guilt, hedonic vs utilitarian preferences), the citation could be serving as a theoretical/mechanism source rather than a purely incidental mention, even though the raw match is only a DOI-level reference entry.
